case_title: CACH, LLC VS. DANA SEGUIN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEGUIN, DANA M AN INDIVIDUAL $10,781.93 PRINCIPAL, $398.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,179.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15050057)
